title: phlox kelseyi subsp. kelseyi
intro: Phlox kelseyi subsp. kelseyi is a subspecies of the Kelseyi's phlox plant, a perennial flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Consuming Phlox kelseyi subsp. kelseyi has been associated with various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a dried herb, making teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its potential medicinal properties.
